case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS DUENAS, ANA G.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-29-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-13-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G. HEARING SET FOR MAY-23-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAY-23-1994, GRANTED
PROPERTY & PAY ABOVE JUDGMENT. DEFT MUST NOTIFY PLFT & ALOW PLFT TO PICK UP SECURED ITEMS BY 8/30/ 94. RING LISTED $700 IS EXCLUDED & NEED NOT BE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,799.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-29-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G.
CORRESPONDENCE FROM ANA G. DUENAS FILED. BANKRUPTCY NO. 9332156 TDM.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G. $1,799.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,854.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23470, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G. PLTFF'S PROPER RECOURSE IS TO PURSUE CLAIM IN BANK RUPTCY CRT. BY OBJECTING DEF'S MOTION ON PROP LIEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G. $550.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.00, CURRECT VALUE OF ITEMS LISTED. JUDGMENT IS STAYED UNTIL 8/30/94. DEFT MAY EITHER SURRENDER SECURED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT DUENAS, ANA G.
